children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: a Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for grants by the Secretary of Health and Human Services to the District of Columbia comprehensive mental health system, $30,000,000 for fiscal year 1988, $24,000,000 for fiscal year 1989, $18,000,000 for fiscal year 1990, and $12,000,000 for fiscal year 1991.

children.heading: Federal agencies; payments to District of costs for treatment of certain patients; responsibility of U.S. for service costs
children.label: b Federal agencies; payments to District of costs for treatment of certain patients; responsibility of U.S. for service costs
A
children.text: Any individual referred to the system pursuant to a Federal statute or by a responsible Federal agency.

children.label: B
children.text: Any individual referred to the system for emergency detention or involuntary commitment after being taken into custody (i) as a direct result of the individual’s action or threat of action against a Federal official, (ii) as a direct result of the individual’s action or threat of action on the grounds of the White House or of the Capitol, or (iii) under chapter 9 of title 21 of the District of Columbia Code.

children.label: C
children.text: Any individual referred to the system as a result of a criminal proceeding in a Federal court (including an individual admitted for treatment, observation, and diagnosis and an individual found incompetent to stand trial or found not guilty by reason of insanity). The preceding provisions of this paragraph apply to any individual referred to the system (or to Saint Elizabeths Hospital) before or after .November 8, 1984

The responsibility of the United States for the cost of services for individuals described in paragraph (1) shall not affect the treatment responsibilities to the District of Columbia under the Interstate Compact on Mental Health.

children.heading: Financial responsibility during coordination period
children.label: c Financial responsibility during coordination period

children.text: During the service coordination and the financial transition periods, the District of Columbia shall gradually assume a greater share of the financial responsibility for the provision of mental health services provided by the system to individuals not described in subsection (b).

children.heading: Shared responsibility for capital improvements
children.label: d Shared responsibility for capital improvements
children.text: Subject to , capital improvements to facilities at Saint Elizabeths Hospital authorized during the service coordination period shall be the shared responsibility of the District and the Federal Government in accordance with .section 225b(f)(2) of this titlePublic Law 83–472

children.heading: Unassigned liabilities; sole responsibility of Federal Government
children.label: e Unassigned liabilities; sole responsibility of Federal Government
children.text: Pursuant to the financial audit under , any unassigned liabilities of the Hospital shall be assumed by and shall be the sole responsibility of the Federal Government.section 225b(f) of this title

children.heading: Audit to determine liability of Federal Government for accrued annual leave balances; authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Audit to determine liability of Federal Government for accrued annual leave balances; authorization of appropriations

children.text: After the service coordination period, the Secretary shall conduct an audit, under generally accepted accounting procedures, to identify the liability of the Federal Government for accrued annual leave balances for those employees assumed by the District under the system implementation plan.
There is authorized to be appropriated for payment by the Federal Government to the District an amount equal to the liability identified by such audit.

children.heading: Authority; District; collection of costs for mental health services
children.label: g Authority; District; collection of costs for mental health services
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall affect the authority of the District of Columbia under any other statute to collect costs billed by the District of Columbia for mental health services, except that payment for the same costs may not be collected from more than one party.

children.heading: Responsibility of United States for certain claims
children.label: h Responsibility of United States for certain claims

children.text: all claims and causes of action against Saint Elizabeths Hospital that accrue before , regardless of the date on which legal proceedings asserting such claims were or may be filed, except that the United States shall, in the case of any tort claim, only be responsible for any such claim against the United States that accrues before , and the United States shall not compromise or settle any claim resulting in District liability without the consent of the District, which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld; andOctober 1, 1987October 1, 1987
all claims that result in a judgment or award against Saint Elizabeths Hospital before .October 1, 1987
